summary: Frontend-only smoke of Remaining Days Countdown web preview. Executed 13 UI scenarios covering first-run, dashboard rendering, countdown math, live ticker, settings modal (open/save/close/backdrop/escape/reset), persistence via localStorage, and console cleanliness. Every check passed with 0 console errors.
passed: First-run screen renders with target-date input and Begin button (data-testid='first-run-screen')
Submitting a valid target date transitions to dashboard (data-testid='dashboard-screen')
All required dashboard testids present: brand-label ('Remaining Days'), today-line, target-label, days-remaining, ticker, percent-value, progress-fill, stat-meta, daily-quote, settings-button
Live ticker H:M:S decrements each second (09:17:51 -> 09:17:50)
Gear button opens settings modal with target/start/label inputs + Save/Reset/Close buttons
Saving target 2028-06-15, start 2024-01-01, label 'My milestone' -> closes modal and updates dashboard: label='My milestone', days=700, percent=56.98% (matches expected 500-700 days / 55-60% range)
Clicking backdrop outside modal closes it
Reset button (confirm auto-accepted) clears localStorage and returns to first-run screen
Persistence: after page reload, saved 'My milestone' state is restored (no first-run shown)
Zero console errors during full flow
notes: Backend skipped per request (pure client-side app). Extension bundle /app/extension/ was not exercised — only the React web preview at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL was tested.
